name: Graveyard Shift
author: Poki
description: Graveyard Shift is a thrilling side-scrolling rail shooter where the undead rise, and it's your job to send them back to the grave! Aim, shoot, and defend yourself against hordes of zombies and other eerie creatures lurking in the shadows. Use your shield to block attacks, but be careful—it won’t last forever! Lock, load, and survive the night in this action-packed battle against the undead! How to play Graveyard Shift? Use the mouse to aim and shoot! Who created Graveyard Shift? Graveyard Shift was created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Double Edged and Bad Ice-Cream 3 ! How can I play Graveyard Shift for free? You can play Graveyard Shift for free on Poki.
